statement: In every magma, Equation 900 (`x = y * ((x * z) * (z * w))`) implies Equation 2962 (`x = ((y * (y * z)) * y) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0449
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op x z) (op z w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op y z)) y) z)
